hero.subtitle: We will make active recreation unforgettable!

about.title: Nemnovo — tour base for your rest
about.p1: We create conditions for a quiet rest in Belarus: nature, silence and everything you need on the territory.
about.p2: We focus on guests from Grodno, Minsk and all of Belarus — families, groups of friends and those who value simplicity and closeness to nature.

reviews.text: Quiet place, nature, everything is welcoming. Recommend.
reviews.author: Anna, Grodno

reviews.text: Family trip — kids loved it, we'll come back.
reviews.author: Dmitry, Minsk

reviews.text: Clean, cosy, attentive hosts. Great fishing.
reviews.author: Sergey, Vitebsk

reviews.text: Third year here — always warm and peaceful.
reviews.author: Olga & Igor, Grodno

reviews.text: Kids had a blast, we relaxed. Sauna is great!
reviews.author: Alexey, Minsk

reviews.text: Nature, silence, campfire by the water — perfect weekend.
reviews.author: Maria, Brest

reviews.text: Just like the photos, even better. Thanks for the hospitality!
reviews.author: Natalia, Gomel

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.intro: Requests go to office@nemnovotour.by. Complaints and suggestions to a separate email.
contact.inboxNote: Requests go to office@nemnovotour.by. We will reply within a day.
contact.thanks: Thank you, we have received your message.

footer.slogan:
Close. Unfamiliar. Belarus.
Create vivid memories with us!
footer.address: Belarus, Grodno region, Grodno district, Sopotskin s/s, Nemnovo village, 15. GPS: 53°51′47″N, 23°45′44″E
footer.addressShort: Belarus, Grodno region, Grodno district, Sopotskin s/s, Nemnovo village, 15

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.p1: This policy defines the processing of personal data on the Nemnovo website.
privacy.p2: The site may use cookies and analytics data (Google Analytics, Yandex Metrica).
privacy.p3: Data from contact forms is used only to respond to your message.

cookiePolicy.title: Cookie policy
cookiePolicy.p1: The site uses cookies for operation, analytics and improving user experience.
cookiePolicy.p2: By continuing to use the site, you agree to the use of cookies under this policy.

portfolioSection.title: Portfolio
portfolioSection.description: Photos from events and trips. You can download an album using the button.

agencies.title: For agencies
agencies.intro: Tour base «Nemnovo» invites travel agencies to partnership and offers favourable terms for cooperation. We organise rest and events in Belarus — you earn commission on every sale.
agencies.why1: Official activity — we operate within the law and are ready for transparent cooperation with agencies.
agencies.why2: Favourable terms — commission for partners and flexible offers for your clients.
agencies.why3: Tours and events with minimal cancellations — reliability for your tourists.
agencies.why4: Up-to-date availability and conditions — we respond quickly and help with selection.
agencies.why5: Manager support — our team is on hand to answer questions and help with sales.
agencies.why6: Small groups and individual approach — comfort and attention for every guest.
agencies.howIntro: If you are interested in partnership:
agencies.howStep1: Contact us by phone or email to clarify details and terms.
agencies.howStep2: Complete the required documents and send them to our address (we will send templates on request).
agencies.howOutro: We value long-term and mutually beneficial relations and are ready to support your agency in growing revenue!
agencies.ctaTitle: We look forward to your enquiries!
